ab: ulra i ruma’ i temu na vavayan?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: ulra, ulra alrupe’ i kiya’ezengan i intaw.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: ulra i ruma’ i temu na vavayan?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: uniyan, mau ziya mupatraran a haremay. raruma’ lra nu karauv.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: ulra i ruma’ i temu na ma’inayan?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: ulra i pukazuwa tazar i intaw. uwa iya’u kantaw.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: ulra a trau i ruma’?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: i Munay a! sawariyan lra ’azi ku mena’u kannu. ’inava u?
ch: B:是Munay啊，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Munay. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: ’inava! zuwa ku kimazayazayar kannu.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: ulra i temama i iyan?
en: Where is your father?

ab: ulra i sawka maringring za kulang i intaw. kay ku vinayaw.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: ulra i Sunay i iyan?
en: Where did Sunay go?

ab: mukuwa i intaw i puwaterukukan ’emevanga za terukuk.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: imu, zuwa mi lra.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: uniyan i temu i ruma’. ulra i ’uma. ngangarayu i inmu i ruma’ kanintaw.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: zuwa u lra, ama!
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: sawariyan ta lra ’azi maretrevung, maratihasar u lra.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: salaw mi semangal mena’u kannu za zuwa u.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: a re’a i ini na vaveray kanmu. asezu i lralritekan.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: kemani sawariyan ’azi u zuwa. ku vinayaw mapiya alamu mukasa ta mekana.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: amanan venangavang lra. ’a’awu ku kana kurisepa. kay ta i pakayanan marezayazayara.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: lrayuwan za nu demaulr. vavuruk ku lra.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: mapiya tremuwak ku kanini na terukuk. urungi muruma’ mekan.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
